# TrustGate

> The trust layer for Web3. Trust scores route USDC payments to AI agents (instant, 24h time-locked, or escrowed by tier), and Token Shield scores any token or contract for deployer credibility and holder authenticity.

## Pages

- [Homepage -- product overview, trust-gated payment tiers, and live transaction stats](https://trustgated.xyz/)
- [Live agent activity -- real-time feed of agent claims and payment routing](https://trustgated.xyz/agents/live)
- [Depositor dashboard -- fund TrustGate with USDC, set per-agent allowances, and monitor claims](https://trustgated.xyz/dashboard)
- [Interactive demo -- walk through a trust-gated payment flow end to end](https://trustgated.xyz/demo)
- [Trust oracle -- query EigenTrust-derived scores for any wallet or agent address](https://trustgated.xyz/oracle)
- [Token Shield -- score any token or contract for deployer credibility and holder authenticity](https://trustgated.xyz/token-shield)
- [Documentation index -- protocol overview, integration guides, and API reference](https://trustgated.xyz/docs)
- [How TrustGate works -- register, deposit, score, claim flow explained](https://trustgated.xyz/docs/how-it-works)
- [Trust scoring model -- wallet and token scoring via EigenTrust on Intuition data](https://trustgated.xyz/docs/trust-scoring)
- [Trust tiers -- HIGH (75-100) instant, MEDIUM (40-74) 24h lock, LOW (0-39) escrow](https://trustgated.xyz/docs/trust-tiers)
- [Payment flow -- USDC routing logic from deposit to agent claim by trust tier](https://trustgated.xyz/docs/payment-flow)
- [Agent registration guide -- permissionlessly register an AI agent on AgentRegistry](https://trustgated.xyz/docs/agent-registration)
- [Agent loop guide -- run the autonomous TypeScript agent that claims and uses USDC](https://trustgated.xyz/docs/agent-loop)
- [Dashboard guide -- depositor walkthrough for funding, allowances, and approvals](https://trustgated.xyz/docs/dashboard-guide)
- [DEX widget integration -- one script tag adds trust badges to any DEX token input](https://trustgated.xyz/docs/widget-integration)
- [Integration overview -- options for wallets, dApps, and DEXes to consume trust scores](https://trustgated.xyz/docs/integration)
- [REST API reference -- endpoints for trust scores, oracle queries, and widget data](https://trustgated.xyz/docs/api-reference)
- [Smart contract reference -- AgentRegistry, TrustGate, and oracle contract addresses and ABIs](https://trustgated.xyz/docs/contracts)
- [Oracle docs -- how trust scores are computed, signed, and published on-chain](https://trustgated.xyz/docs/oracle)
- [Margin analysis -- economic model and risk parameters for trust tiers](https://trustgated.xyz/docs/margin-analysis)
- [Local setup -- clone, install, and run TrustGate against Arc testnet](https://trustgated.xyz/docs/local-setup)
